skipped_criteria: Inclusion #2: Minimum weight of 40kg — no weight field in schema.
Inclusion #3: Meeting concussion criteria per American Congress of Rehabilitative Medicine — no structured concussion-diagnosis field in schema.
Inclusion #4: Present within 4 days of injury — temporal/time-since-injury logic not supported by schema.
Inclusion #5: Post-menarchal females must have a negative urine pregnancy test and use acceptable contraception — menarchal status and contraception method not in schema.
Inclusion #6: Informed consent requirements for minors vs. adults — consent/guardian logic not in schema.
Exclusion #1 (partial): TBI requiring hospital admission or neurosurgical intervention — only GCS threshold is encoded; admission/surgical requirement fields not in schema.
Exclusion #2: Prior concussion or TBI within 90 days — prior injury history and temporal logic not in schema.
Exclusion #3: Known or family history of maple syrup urine disease — medical/family history fields not in schema.
Exclusion #4: Investigational drug use within 30 days prior to enrollment — medication history and temporal logic not in schema.
Exclusion #5: Hypersensitivity to any ingredient in active or placebo products — allergy/hypersensitivity fields not in schema.
Exclusion #6 (partial): Planning to become pregnant during study or breastfeeding — future pregnancy intent and breastfeeding status not in schema.
Exclusion #7: Non-English speaking participants or parent/guardian — language fields not in schema.
